sentence: The typhoon was coming, so the school decided to _____ the sports day to a safer date.
explanation: postpone 指延期。颱風來襲、改到較安全的日期是把活動延後，故選 postpone；cancel 為取消，與「to a safer date」改期不符。

sentence: Mr. Lin is a _____ man who often donates money to help poor children in his town.
explanation: generous 指慷慨大方。常捐錢幫助貧童正是慷慨，故選 generous；greedy 貪心語意相反。

sentence: The instructions were so _____ that none of us knew how to set up the new machine.
explanation: confusing 指令人困惑。正因說明令人困惑，大家才不會操作，clear、simple、helpful 都與「none of us knew」矛盾。

sentence: She felt _____ after running for a whole hour, so she sat down to drink some water.
explanation: exhausted 指筋疲力盡。跑了一整個小時後坐下喝水，符合疲累的情境，故選 exhausted。

sentence: The little boy tried to _____ his broken toy by sticking the pieces together with glue.
explanation: repair 指修理。用膠水把碎片黏在一起是修理玩具，故選 repair；其餘 r 開頭字語意都不合。

sentence: Because the traffic was terrible, the bus _____ at the station twenty minutes later than usual.
explanation: arrive 指抵達。公車比平常晚到站，故選 arrived；depart 是出發，語意相反。

sentence: The hotel room was very _____ ; we could hear every word from the people next door.
explanation: noisy 指吵雜。能聽到隔壁的每句話，表示房間很吵、隔音差，故選 noisy；silent 安靜語意相反。

sentence: Remember to _____ the electricity bill before the end of this month, or the power will be cut.
explanation: pay 指支付。月底前要繳電費，否則會被斷電，故選 pay。

sentence: He spoke so _____ that the people sitting at the back could not hear him at all.
explanation: quietly 指小聲地。後排完全聽不到，表示他講得太小聲，故選 quietly；loudly 大聲相反。

sentence: After the long holiday, the students felt _____ to go back to school and meet their friends.
explanation: eager 指渴望的。長假後想回學校見朋友是滿心期待，故選 eager。

sentence: The scientist will _____ the results of the experiment at the meeting next Friday.
explanation: present 指發表、呈現。在會議上發表實驗結果，故選 present；其餘形近字語意都不同。

sentence: The mountain road becomes very _____ after it rains, so drivers should slow down.
explanation: slippery 指濕滑的。下雨後路面濕滑、駕駛要減速，故選 slippery。

sentence: Tom forgot his pen, so he had to _____ one from his classmate.
explanation: borrow 指向別人借東西。忘記帶筆只好向同學借一枝，故選 borrow；lend 是借出，方向相反。

sentence: Please _____ this book to the library before Friday.
explanation: return 指歸還。要求週五前把書還給圖書館，故選 return。

sentence: It started to rain, so Amy opened her _____ to keep dry.
explanation: umbrella 指雨傘。下雨了要撐傘保持乾燥，故選 umbrella。

sentence: Before dinner, remember to _____ your hands with soap.
explanation: wash 指清洗。飯前用肥皂洗手是衛生習慣，故選 wash。

sentence: Danny worked hard and managed to _____ his homework before dinner.
explanation: finish 指完成。認真做完功課才能趕上晚餐時間，故選 finish；start 開始語意相反。

sentence: When Amy didn't know a word, she looked it up in a _____.
explanation: dictionary 指字典。查詢不懂的單字要用字典，故選 dictionary。

sentence: Please don't _____ to bring your umbrella; it may rain today.
explanation: forget 指忘記。提醒別忘記帶傘以免淋雨，故選 forget。

sentence: You need to buy a _____ before you can get on the train.
explanation: ticket 指車票。搭火車前要先買票，故選 ticket。

sentence: The door was heavy, so John had to _____ it hard to open it.
explanation: push 指推。門很重需要用力推才能打開，故選 push；pull 拉是反方向動作。

sentence: The little girl tried to _____ the rope to ring the bell.
explanation: pull 指拉。拉繩子才能讓鈴響，故選 pull。

sentence: After school, the children ran to the _____ to play on the swings.
explanation: playground 指遊樂場。放學後去盪鞦韆要到遊樂場，故選 playground。

sentence: Be careful! Don't _____ the glass cup while washing it.
explanation: break 指打破。洗杯子時要小心避免打破，故選 break。

sentence: Every morning, Ken puts his books and lunch box into his _____.
explanation: backpack 指背包。把書和便當放進背包準備上學，故選 backpack。

sentence: The movie will _____ at seven o'clock, so let's hurry.
explanation: begin 指開始。電影七點要開始了必須趕快，故選 begin；end 結束語意相反。

sentence: The _____ grows rice and vegetables on his land every year.
explanation: farmer 指農夫。在自己土地上種稻米蔬菜的人是農夫，故選 farmer。

sentence: Please don't _____ your trash on the ground; use the trash can.
explanation: throw 指丟。垃圾不能亂丟要丟進垃圾桶，故選 throw。

sentence: After the accident, he was sent to the _____ to see a doctor.
explanation: hospital 指醫院。意外後要送醫看診，故選 hospital。

sentence: The night market was so _____ that we could hardly move.
explanation: crowded 指擁擠的。夜市人多到幾乎無法移動，故選 crowded；peaceful、silent 皆與擁擠情境相反。

sentence: Emma decided to _____ all her classmates to her birthday party next Saturday.
explanation: invite 指邀請。決定邀請全班同學參加生日派對，故選 invite。

sentence: The cake Grandma made was so _____ that everyone asked for a second piece.
explanation: delicious 指美味的。大家都要求再吃一塊，暗示蛋糕非常好吃，故選 delicious。

sentence: If you want to speak English well, you need to _____ every single day.
explanation: practice 指練習。想把英文說好需要每天練習，故選 practice。

sentence: Before the big exam, Judy felt so _____ that she could not sleep well.
explanation: nervous 指緊張的。考前緊張到睡不好，故選 nervous；relaxed 放鬆語意相反。

sentence: The teacher had to _____ the difficult grammar rule again and again.
explanation: explain 指解釋。困難的文法規則需要老師一再解釋，故選 explain。

sentence: It is _____ to say "thank you" when someone helps you.
explanation: polite 指有禮貌的。別人幫忙時說謝謝是禮貌的表現，故選 polite。

sentence: Turning off the lights when you leave a room can help protect the _____.
explanation: environment 指環境。隨手關燈能幫助保護環境，故選 environment。

sentence: Reading more books every week can really _____ your writing skills.
explanation: improve 指改善。多閱讀能改善寫作能力，故選 improve；reduce 減少與句意不符。

sentence: This sofa is so _____ that I always fall asleep on it.
explanation: comfortable 指舒適的。坐在上面總是不小心睡著，暗示沙發很舒適，故選 comfortable。

sentence: Wearing a helmet can _____ your head if you fall off your bike.
explanation: protect 指保護。戴安全帽能在跌倒時保護頭部，故選 protect。

sentence: The twins look so _____ that even their teacher cannot tell them apart.
explanation: similar 指相似的。連老師都分不出雙胞胎，暗示他們長得很像，故選 similar。

sentence: Jason likes to _____ stamps from different countries as his hobby.
explanation: collect 指收集。當作興趣收集各國郵票，故選 collect。

sentence: Living near the MRT station is very _____ for people who work in the city.
explanation: convenient 指方便的。住在捷運站附近對上班族來說很方便，故選 convenient。

sentence: Good coaches always _____ their players, even after they lose a game.
explanation: encourage 指鼓勵。好教練即使輸球也會鼓勵球員，故選 encourage；blame 責怪語意相反。

sentence: A good nurse must be _____ when taking care of sick people.
explanation: patient 指有耐心的。照顧病人需要耐心，故選 patient。

sentence: Students should _____ for the test by reviewing their notes every night.
explanation: prepare 指準備。學生應該複習筆記為考試做準備，故選 prepare。

sentence: Because her little sister was afraid of the dark, Amy decided to _____ her to the bathroom at night.
explanation: accompany 指陪同。妹妹怕黑，所以決定晚上陪她去廁所，故選 accompany。

sentence: Since the flight was delayed for hours, all the passengers waiting at the gate became increasingly _____.
explanation: anxious 指焦慮的。班機延誤數小時使乘客越來越焦慮，故選 anxious。

sentence: After training every day for a whole year, the young athlete finally managed to _____ her Olympic dream.
explanation: achieve 指達成。訓練一整年終於達成奧運夢想，故選 achieve。

sentence: Even though the weather was terrible, the rescue team _____ found all the missing hikers before nightfall.
explanation: successfully 指成功地。儘管天氣惡劣，搜救隊仍成功找到所有失蹤登山客，故選 successfully。

sentence: Since the museum is very popular, all visitors are _____ to book tickets online in advance.
explanation: required 指被要求的。博物館太熱門，遊客被要求先上網訂票，故選 required。

sentence: Although the shop was small, the prices were so _____ that many customers came back again and again.
explanation: reasonable 指合理的。價格合理讓顧客願意一再光顧，故選 reasonable。

sentence: Since my friend enjoyed the restaurant so much, she decided to _____ it to everyone in our group.
explanation: recommend 指推薦。朋友很喜歡這間餐廳，因此決定推薦給大家，故選 recommend。

sentence: Although the injury was serious at first, the patient's condition _____ improved over the following weeks.
explanation: gradually 指逐漸地。傷勢在接下來幾週內逐漸好轉，故選 gradually；suddenly 突然與情境不符。

sentence: Because the road was under construction, drivers were told to _____ that area during rush hour.
explanation: avoid 指避免。道路施工，駕駛被告知尖峰時間要避開該區域，故選 avoid。

sentence: Even though it was her first speech contest, Mia looked very _____ standing on the stage.
explanation: confident 指有自信的。雖是第一次參加演講比賽，Mia 站上台看起來很有自信，故選 confident。

sentence: Since he worked so hard on the project, everyone agreed that he _____ the award.
explanation: deserve 指應得。他在專案上如此努力，大家都認為他應得這個獎，故選 deserve。

sentence: Although the trip had many delays, the tired travelers _____ arrived at their hotel late at night.
explanation: eventually 指最終。儘管旅途一再延誤，疲憊的旅客最終在深夜抵達飯店，故選 eventually。

sentence: Even with a broken leg, the climber somehow _____ to reach the top of the mountain.
explanation: manage(to)指設法做到。即使腿受傷，攀登者仍設法登頂，故選 manage。

sentence: Because the old bridge was no longer _____, the city decided to build a new one.
explanation: reliable 指可靠的。舊橋不再可靠，市政府決定新建一座，故選 reliable。

sentence: Many students _____ their teacher because she always helps them patiently after class.
explanation: admire 指欽佩。老師總是耐心幫助學生，因此許多學生欽佩她，故選 admire。

sentence: Since he was worried about his exam results, he _____ checked his phone for the announcement.
explanation: constantly 指不斷地。擔心考試結果，他不斷查看手機，故選 constantly。

sentence: Although she wanted to try the roller coaster, she _____ before finally getting on it.
explanation: hesitate 指猶豫。雖然想玩雲霄飛車，她還是猶豫了一下才坐上去，故選 hesitate。

sentence: Even though the puzzle was extremely difficult, Leo refused to _____ until he solved it.
explanation: give up 指放棄。拼圖極難但 Leo 不肯放棄直到解開，故選 give up。

sentence: Because it started raining heavily, the coach decided to _____ the outdoor practice until next week.
explanation: put off 指延後。雨勢過大，教練決定將戶外練習延後到下週，故選 put off。

sentence: The manager was late again; _____, his car had broken down on the highway.
explanation: apparently 指據說、顯然。經理又遲到了，據說他的車在高速公路上拋錨，故選 apparently。

sentence: Before the hike, make sure you bring _____ water, since there are no stores along the trail.
explanation: sufficient 指足夠的。健行前應帶足夠的水，因為途中沒有商店，故選 sufficient。

sentence: The design team spent all week trying to _____ a new solution for the packaging problem.
explanation: come up with 指想出。設計團隊整週都在設法想出包裝新方案，故選 come up with。

sentence: Although she usually cooks at home, she _____ orders food when she is too tired.
explanation: occasionally 指偶爾。雖然通常在家煮飯，太累時偶爾會叫外送，故選 occasionally。

sentence: The new policy caused a _____ change in how students use the library.
explanation: significant 指重大的。新政策造成圖書館使用方式的重大改變，故選 significant。

sentence: Even though the salary was good, she decided to _____ the job offer because of the long hours.
explanation: turn down 指拒絕。儘管薪水不錯，她仍因工時過長而拒絕這份工作，故選 turn down。

sentence: Although the plan wasn't finalized, the manager said the event would _____ happen next month.
explanation: definitely 指確定地。雖然計畫尚未定案，經理仍表示活動下個月一定會舉行，故選 definitely。

sentence: The new machine is much more _____ than the old one, finishing the same task in half the time.
explanation: efficient 指有效率的。新機器能在一半時間內完成同樣工作，遠比舊機器有效率，故選 efficient。

sentence: Before opening the new store, the company needed to _____ a detailed market survey.
explanation: carry out 指執行。開新店前公司需要先執行詳細的市場調查，故選 carry out。

sentence: Although she enjoys most sports, she is _____ fond of swimming.
explanation: particularly 指特別地。雖然大部分運動她都喜歡，但特別喜愛游泳，故選 particularly。

sentence: Even though the task was difficult, he was _____ to ask for help because he wanted to prove himself.
explanation: reluctant 指不情願的。任務雖難，他仍不情願求助，因為想證明自己，故選 reluctant。

sentence: After checking the manual several times, she finally managed to _____ how the device worked.
explanation: figure out 指弄清楚。查了說明書好幾次後，她終於弄清楚裝置的運作方式，故選 figure out。

sentence: Since he hadn't studied at all, he was _____ nervous before the test.
explanation: obviously 指明顯地。完全沒讀書，考前他明顯很緊張，故選 obviously。

sentence: A _____ roommate always keeps the noise down when others are sleeping.
explanation: considerate 指體貼的。體貼的室友總會在別人睡覺時放低音量，故選 considerate。

sentence: On the way to the airport, their car suddenly _____, so they had to call a taxi.
explanation: break down 指故障。前往機場途中車子突然故障，只好叫計程車，故選 break down。

sentence: Because the storm warning had just been issued and the organizers worried about safety, they decided to _____ the outdoor concert.
explanation: call off 指取消。暴風警報剛發布，主辦單位擔心安全便決定取消戶外演唱會，故選 call off。

sentence: Since the two companies were fighting over the same small market and neither would back down, a price war _____ broke out.
explanation: inevitably 指不可避免地。兩家公司都不肯讓步，價格戰不可避免地爆發，故選 inevitably。

sentence: Although the theory sounded strange to most scientists at the time, later experiments were able to _____ that it was actually correct.
explanation: demonstrate 指證明。理論當初聽起來很怪，但後來的實驗證明它是對的，故選 demonstrate。

sentence: Even though the noise from the construction site outside her window kept her awake every night, she had no choice but to _____ it until the project ended.
explanation: put up with 指忍受。窗外施工噪音吵到睡不著，她別無選擇只能忍受到工程結束，故選 put up with。

sentence: Because the factory had ignored the safety regulations for years, and an inspection finally revealed the violations, the government _____ shut it down.
explanation: consequently 指因此。工廠多年忽視安全法規，稽查揭露違規後政府因此將其關閉，故選 consequently。

sentence: Although he was reluctant to admit his mistake in front of the whole team, he eventually had to _____ that the plan had failed.
explanation: acknowledge 指承認。雖不情願在全隊面前認錯，他最終還是承認計畫失敗，故選 acknowledge。

sentence: Since the boy had cheated on the test before without being caught, he assumed he could _____ it again this time.
explanation: get away with 指僥倖逃脫責罰。之前作弊沒被抓到，他以為這次還能僥倖過關，故選 get away with。

sentence: Since the CEO abruptly canceled all her meetings and left the office early without any explanation, something urgent had _____ happened at home.
explanation: presumably 指據推測。執行長突然取消所有會議提早離開卻不解釋，家裡據推測發生急事，故選 presumably。

sentence: Because the manager constantly criticized her work in front of other colleagues, his comments began to _____ her confidence.
explanation: undermine 指削弱。經理在同事面前不斷批評她的工作，這些話開始削弱她的自信，故選 undermine。

sentence: While cleaning out the old attic that her grandmother had left untouched for decades, she happened to _____ a collection of handwritten letters.
explanation: come across 指偶然發現。整理祖母多年未動的閣樓時，她偶然發現一疊手寫信件，故選 come across。

sentence: Although she had strongly opposed the idea during the meeting, she _____ agreed to follow the new schedule after her boss insisted.
explanation: reluctantly 指不情願地。雖然在會議上強烈反對，老闆堅持後她還是不情願地同意新時程，故選 reluctantly。

sentence: Since the airline had canceled the flight without warning and many passengers missed important events, the company agreed to _____ them with vouchers.
explanation: compensate 指補償。航空公司無預警取消班機導致乘客錯過重要行程，公司同意以票券補償，故選 compensate。

sentence: When the founder retired unexpectedly after the company's sudden financial trouble, his daughter had to _____ the business much sooner than planned.
explanation: take over 指接管。創辦人在公司財務出狀況後突然退休，女兒被迫提早接管事業，故選 take over。

sentence: Because the bridge had been damaged in the earthquake and inspectors closed it for repairs, traffic in the area was _____ diverted to a longer route.
explanation: subsequently 指隨後。橋樑在地震中受損遭關閉維修，該區交通隨後被改道，故選 subsequently。

sentence: Since the weather forecast had warned of heavy rain for days, the farmers had already begun to _____ a poor harvest this year.
explanation: anticipate 指預期。氣象預報連日警告豪雨，農民已開始預期今年將歉收，故選 anticipate。

sentence: Even though the old photograph was faded and torn, she decided to _____ it because it was the only picture of her grandparents.
explanation: hold on to 指緊抓不放。舊照片雖褪色破損，她仍決定留著，因為那是祖父母唯一的照片，故選 hold on to。

sentence: Since Grandpa lives on a remote island far from the mainland and travel there is difficult, the rest of the family only manages to visit him _____, usually just once every few years.
explanation: once in a blue moon 指千載難逢地、極少發生。爺爺住在偏遠離島，全家人通常好幾年才去看他一次，故選 once in a blue moon。

sentence: Although the two laptops look almost identical on the outside, they are very different _____ battery life and processing speed.
explanation: in terms of 指就...而言。兩台筆電外觀幾乎一樣，但電池續航力與處理速度上差異很大，故選 in terms of。

sentence: Even though she had promised to attend the meeting, she texted to say she was feeling a bit _____ and would need to reschedule.
explanation: under the weather 指身體不舒服。她原本答應開會，卻傳訊息說身體不太舒服需要改期，故選 under the weather。

sentence: Although it took her nearly two years after the divorce, she finally began to _____ the fact that her old life was truly over.
explanation: come to terms with 指接受(難以接受的事實)。離婚近兩年後，她才終於開始接受舊生活真正結束的事實，故選 come to terms with。

sentence: Because the young executive was so determined to get promoted, he worked overtime every night, often _____ his health and family time.
explanation: at the expense of 指以...為代價。年輕主管為了升遷每晚加班，常以健康與家庭時間為代價，故選 at the expense of。

sentence: Although losing his job seemed like a disaster at the time, it turned out to be _____, since it pushed him to start the business he had always dreamed of.
explanation: a blessing in disguise 指因禍得福。失業當時看似災難，卻促使他開始夢想已久的事業，故選 a blessing in disguise。

sentence: Even though the family had lost most of their savings in the crash, they still tried hard to _____ by keeping their large house and expensive car.
explanation: keep up appearances 指維持體面、裝門面。家裡財務出狀況後仍勉強保留大房子和名車撐場面，故選 keep up appearances。

sentence: Although the rescue workers were exhausted and the storm kept growing stronger, they continued searching for survivors _____ great danger.
explanation: in the face of 指面對(困難)。救難人員筋疲力盡且風暴持續增強，仍在極大危險中持續搜救，故選 in the face of。

sentence: Although he dreaded going to the dentist, he finally decided to _____ and book the appointment he had been avoiding for months.
explanation: bite the bullet 指咬緊牙關面對。雖然害怕看牙醫，他終於決定硬著頭皮預約已拖延數月的看診，故選 bite the bullet。

sentence: Since both of her part-time jobs paid very little and rent kept rising every year, she struggled every month just to _____.
explanation: make ends meet 指收支平衡。兩份兼職薪水都很低，房租又年年上漲，她每月都得努力維持收支平衡，故選 make ends meet。

sentence: Because the director was traveling abroad and could not attend the ceremony, his assistant accepted the award _____ the whole company.
explanation: on behalf of 指代表。導演出國無法出席頒獎典禮，助理代表整間公司領獎，故選 on behalf of。

sentence: Although everyone had promised to keep the surprise party a secret, Jenny accidentally _____ while chatting with the birthday girl on the phone.
explanation: spill the beans 指洩漏秘密。大家都答應保密驚喜派對，珍妮卻在跟壽星聊天時不小心洩漏了秘密，故選 spilled the beans。

sentence: Although his email sounded polite on the surface, she could _____ and tell that he was actually quite upset about the decision.
explanation: read between the lines 指解讀言外之意。他的信表面禮貌，但她能解讀言外之意知道他其實對決定很不滿，故選 read between the lines。

sentence: Since the new employees had many questions about the company's policies, the manager sent a detailed email _____ vacation days and sick leave.
explanation: with regard to 指關於。新進員工對公司政策有許多疑問，經理發了一封關於休假與病假規定的詳細信件，故選 with regard to。

sentence: Because the contractor was under pressure to finish the building before the deadline, he began to _____, which later caused serious safety problems.
explanation: cut corners 指偷工減料。承包商為了趕在期限前完工開始偷工減料，之後造成嚴重的安全問題，故選 cut corners。

sentence: Although the company had received several confusing complaints from customers, the manager was determined to _____ the real cause of the problem.
explanation: get to the bottom of 指查明真相。公司收到多起令人困惑的客訴，經理決心查明問題真正的原因，故選 get to the bottom of。

sentence: After stepping on her foot by accident, Tom quickly turned to _____ to the woman on the train.
explanation: apologize 指道歉。不小心踩到別人的腳應該道歉，故選 apologize；complain 抱怨語意不符。

sentence: I really _____ your help with my math homework; I could not have finished it without you.
explanation: appreciate 指感激。他人幫忙寫功課應心懷感激，故選 appreciate。

sentence: The two brothers often _____ about which TV channel to watch.
explanation: argue 指爭吵。因看哪個頻道意見不合而爭吵，故選 argue；agree 同意語意相反。

sentence: All students are required to _____ the school assembly every Monday morning.
explanation: attend 指出席。學生每週一早上都必須出席週會，故選 attend。

sentence: The whole family gathered together to _____ Grandpa's eightieth birthday.
explanation: celebrate 指慶祝。全家聚在一起慶祝爺爺八十歲生日，故選 celebrate。

sentence: Several customers began to _____ loudly when the restaurant took over an hour to serve their food.
explanation: complain 指抱怨。上菜等超過一小時，顧客開始大聲抱怨，故選 complain。

sentence: This bottle of juice _____ a lot of sugar, so you shouldn't drink too much of it.
explanation: contain 指含有。果汁含糖量高，不宜喝太多，故選 contains。

sentence: Even though it started to rain, the players decided to _____ the game.
explanation: continue 指繼續。即使下雨，球員仍決定繼續比賽，故選 continue；quit 放棄語意相反。

sentence: It is important to _____ your temper instead of shouting at others when you are angry.
explanation: control 指控制。生氣時應控制脾氣而非對人吼叫，故選 control。

sentence: Doctors are working hard to find a new medicine to _____ the disease.
explanation: cure 指治癒。醫生努力研發新藥治癒疾病，故選 cure。

sentence: The heavy storm _____ many houses along the coast last night.
explanation: damage 指損害。強烈風暴損毀了沿海許多房屋，故選 damaged。

sentence: Every December, families _____ their houses with colorful lights and ornaments.
explanation: decorate 指裝飾。十二月家家戶戶用彩燈和裝飾品裝飾房子，故選 decorate。

sentence: The heavy snow _____ the flight for almost five hours.
explanation: delay 指延誤。大雪使班機延誤將近五小時，故選 delayed。

sentence: The company promises to _____ your package within three days.
explanation: deliver 指遞送。公司承諾三天內遞送包裹，故選 deliver。

sentence: Can you _____ what the thief looked like to the police officer?
explanation: describe 指描述。向警察描述小偷的外貌，故選 describe。

sentence: Scientists are trying to _____ a cheaper way to produce clean energy.
explanation: develop 指開發。科學家嘗試開發更便宜的乾淨能源生產方式，故選 develop。

sentence: The magician made the rabbit _____ right in front of the audience.
explanation: disappear 指消失。魔術師讓兔子在觀眾面前消失，故選 disappear。

sentence: Scientists _____ a new kind of insect deep in the rain forest.
explanation: discover 指發現。科學家在雨林深處發現新種昆蟲，故選 discovered。

sentence: The teacher asked the students to _____ the topic in small groups.
explanation: discuss 指討論。老師要學生分組討論主題，故選 discuss。

sentence: The teacher decided to _____ the class into four small groups for the project.
explanation: divide 指分成。老師決定將班級分成四小組進行專案，故選 divide。

sentence: He works part-time on weekends to _____ some extra money.
explanation: earn 指賺取。週末打工賺取額外的錢，故選 earn。

sentence: Falling asleep during the meeting really _____ him in front of his boss.
explanation: embarrass 指使尷尬。開會打瞌睡讓他在老闆面前很尷尬，故選 embarrassed。

sentence: The doctor carefully _____ the patient's arm to see if the bone was broken.
explanation: examine 指檢查。醫生仔細檢查病人的手臂看骨頭是否斷裂，故選 examined。

sentence: Many people believe that ghosts do not really _____.
explanation: exist 指存在。許多人相信鬼並不真的存在，故選 exist。

sentence: We didn't _____ so many people to come to the small party.
explanation: expect 指預期。沒有預期到這麼多人來參加小派對，故選 expect。

sentence: It took her a long time to _____ her friend for breaking the promise.
explanation: forgive 指原諒。花了很長時間才原諒朋友違背承諾，故選 forgive。

sentence: Dark clouds began to _____ in the sky, so we hurried home before the rain started.
explanation: gather 指聚集。烏雲開始在天空聚集，因此趕在下雨前回家，故選 gather。

sentence: The host stood at the door to _____ each guest with a warm smile.
explanation: greet 指問候、迎接。主人站在門口以微笑迎接每位客人，故選 greet。

sentence: The company decided to _____ three new engineers this month.
explanation: hire 指雇用。公司決定本月雇用三位新工程師，故選 hire；fire 解雇語意相反。

sentence: Wolves usually _____ in groups instead of alone.
explanation: hunt 指狩獵。狼通常成群狩獵而非獨自行動，故選 hunt。

sentence: The price of the tour does not _____ meals or hotel rooms.
explanation: include 指包含。旅行團費用不包含餐費或住宿，故選 include。

sentence: The number of visitors to the museum has _____ greatly since it added new exhibits.
explanation: increase 指增加。新增展覽後博物館遊客數大幅增加，故選 increased。

sentence: Although Amy offered to pay, her friend _____ on paying for dinner himself.
explanation: insist 指堅持。儘管 Amy 表示要付錢，朋友仍堅持自己付晚餐錢，故選 insisted。

sentence: It is impolite to _____ someone while they are still speaking.
explanation: interrupt 指打斷。別人說話時打斷是不禮貌的行為，故選 interrupt。

sentence: Let me _____ my new classmate, who just moved here from Tainan.
explanation: introduce 指介紹。介紹剛從台南搬來的新同學，故選 introduce。

sentence: Alexander Graham Bell is famous for helping to _____ the telephone.
explanation: invent 指發明。貝爾以協助發明電話聞名，故選 invent；discover 指發現既有事物，語意不同。

sentence: It is important to _____ good relationships with your neighbors.
explanation: maintain 指維持。與鄰居維持良好關係很重要，故選 maintain。

sentence: Drivers must _____ the traffic rules to keep everyone safe.
explanation: obey 指遵守。駕駛必須遵守交通規則以維護安全，故選 obey；break 違反語意相反。

sentence: A kind stranger _____ to help the old man carry his heavy bags.
explanation: offer 指主動提供。好心的陌生人主動提出幫老人提重物，故選 offered。

sentence: It took the new worker a week to learn how to _____ the machine safely.
explanation: operate 指操作。新員工花一週學會安全操作機器，故選 operate。

sentence: The students worked together to _____ a charity concert for the flood victims.
explanation: organize 指籌辦。學生合力籌辦一場為水災受災戶募款的慈善音樂會，故選 organize。

sentence: Factories that _____ the river without permission should be fined.
explanation: pollute 指污染。未經許可污染河流的工廠應被罰款，故選 pollute。

sentence: The coach always _____ his players in public, even when they make mistakes.
explanation: praise 指稱讚。教練即使球員犯錯也總在公開場合稱讚他們，故選 praises。

sentence: This factory can _____ over a thousand toys every day.
explanation: produce 指生產。這間工廠每天能生產超過一千個玩具，故選 produce。

sentence: Ben _____ his mother that he would clean his room before dinner.
explanation: promise 指承諾。Ben 向媽媽承諾晚餐前會整理房間，故選 promised。

sentence: The teacher decided to _____ the students who broke the classroom rules.
explanation: punish 指懲罰。老師決定懲罰違反班規的學生，故選 punish。

sentence: Halfway to school, Ken suddenly _____ that he had left his lunch box at home.
explanation: realize 指意識到。走到半路 Ken 突然意識到便當忘在家裡，故選 realized。

sentence: Every year, Grandma _____ many birthday cards from her grandchildren.
explanation: receive 指收到。奶奶每年都會收到孫子女寄來的生日卡，故選 receives。

sentence: It took him almost a month to _____ from his bad cold.
explanation: recover 指康復。他花了將近一個月才從重感冒中康復，故選 recover。

sentence: The manager decided to _____ the plan because it was too expensive.
explanation: reject 指拒絕、駁回。經理因計畫太昂貴而決定駁回，故選 reject；accept 接受語意相反。

sentence: Please _____ me to bring my umbrella tomorrow morning.
explanation: remind 指提醒。請提醒我明天早上帶傘，故選 remind。

sentence: Since they only need the car for one day, they decided to _____ one instead of buying it.
explanation: rent 指租用。只需要用車一天，決定租車而非購買，故選 rent。

sentence: Could you please _____ the question? I didn't hear it clearly.
explanation: repeat 指重複。沒聽清楚問題，因此請對方再說一次，故選 repeat。

sentence: She hasn't _____ to my message yet, so I'm not sure if she got it.
explanation: reply 指回覆。她還沒回覆我的訊息，不確定是否收到，故選 replied。

sentence: Good students should _____ their teachers and classmates.
explanation: respect 指尊重。好學生應尊重師長與同學，故選 respect。

sentence: Please _____ the best answer from the four choices below.
explanation: select 指選擇。從下方四個選項中選出最佳答案，故選 select。

sentence: The teacher asked the students to _____ the trash into paper, plastic, and glass.
explanation: separate 指分開、分類。老師要學生把垃圾分成紙類、塑膠和玻璃，故選 separate。

sentence: It took the whole class an hour to _____ the difficult math problem.
explanation: solve 指解決。全班花了一小時解出這道困難的數學題，故選 solve。

sentence: The thief tried to _____ the woman's purse on the crowded bus.
explanation: steal 指偷竊。小偷試圖在擁擠的公車上偷走婦人的皮包，故選 steal。

sentence: After many failures, he finally _____ in passing the driving test.
explanation: succeed 指成功。經歷多次失敗，他終於成功通過駕照考試，故選 succeeded。

sentence: My doctor _____ that I drink more water every day.
explanation: suggest 指建議。醫生建議我每天多喝水，故選 suggested。

sentence: My parents always _____ me in whatever I choose to do.
explanation: support 指支持。父母總是支持我做的任何選擇，故選 support。

sentence: It is amazing that the little plant managed to _____ the cold winter.
explanation: survive 指存活。這株小植物竟能撐過寒冬存活下來，令人驚訝，故選 survive。

sentence: The small dog began to bark loudly when a stranger tried to _____ its owner.
explanation: attack 指攻擊。陌生人試圖攻擊主人，小狗因此大聲吠叫，故選 attack。

sentence: Instead of trying to _____ each other, the team members decided to fix the problem together.
explanation: blame 指責怪。與其互相責怪，隊員決定一起解決問題，故選 blame。

sentence: The car _____ on the highway caused a long traffic jam this morning.
explanation: accident 指意外事故。高速公路上的意外事故造成今早長長的塞車，故選 accident。

sentence: Speaking two languages gives her a big _____ when looking for a job.
explanation: advantage 指優點、優勢。會說兩種語言在求職時是很大的優勢，故選 advantage。

sentence: You only need a small _____ of sugar to make this cake sweet enough.
explanation: amount 指（不可數的）數量，糖是不可數名詞，故用 amount 而非 number，選 amount。

sentence: People should not judge others only by their _____.
explanation: appearance 指外表。不應只憑外表評斷他人，故選 appearance。

sentence: I read an interesting _____ about ocean pollution in the newspaper this morning.
explanation: article 指文章。今早在報紙上讀到一篇關於海洋污染的有趣文章，故選 article。

sentence: The singer bowed to the _____ after finishing her last song.
explanation: audience 指觀眾。歌手唱完最後一首歌向觀眾鞠躬，故選 audience。

sentence: Reading books every day is good exercise for your _____.
explanation: brain 指大腦。每天讀書對大腦是很好的運動，故選 brain。

sentence: After graduating from college, she started her _____ as a nurse.
explanation: career 指職業生涯。大學畢業後她展開護理師的職業生涯，故選 career。

sentence: This trip to Japan may be my only _____ to see cherry blossoms in person.
explanation: chance 指機會。這趟日本行可能是親眼看櫻花的唯一機會，故選 chance。

sentence: The main _____ in the movie is a brave young girl who saves her village.
explanation: character 指角色。電影主角是拯救村莊的勇敢女孩，故選 character。

sentence: As a good _____, you should follow the laws of your country.
explanation: citizen 指公民。身為好公民應遵守國家的法律，故選 citizen。

sentence: Scientists study how human activities are slowly changing the Earth's _____.
explanation: climate 指氣候。科學家研究人類活動如何緩慢改變地球的氣候，故選 climate。

sentence: The teacher wrote a short _____ on my essay to explain what I should improve.
explanation: comment 指評語。老師在作文上寫了簡短評語說明該改進之處，故選 comment。

sentence: The two neighbors had a _____ over where to put the fence between their yards.
explanation: conflict 指衝突。兩位鄰居因院子間籬笆位置起了衝突，故選 conflict。

sentence: It took a lot of _____ for her to speak in front of the whole school.
explanation: courage 指勇氣。在全校面前演講需要很大的勇氣，故選 courage。

sentence: Stealing money from other people is a serious _____.
explanation: crime 指犯罪。偷別人的錢是嚴重的犯罪行為，故選 crime。

sentence: The company faced a financial _____ after losing its biggest customer.
explanation: crisis 指危機。公司失去最大客戶後面臨財務危機，故選 crisis。

sentence: Traveling to different countries helps you understand other people's _____.
explanation: culture 指文化。到不同國家旅行有助於了解他人的文化，故選 culture。

sentence: Taking off your shoes before entering a house is a common _____ in Taiwan.
explanation: custom 指習俗。進屋前脫鞋在台灣是常見習俗，故選 custom。

sentence: The class held a _____ about whether students should wear uniforms.
explanation: debate 指辯論。班上針對是否該穿制服舉行辯論，故選 debate。

sentence: She earned a _____ in biology from the university last year.
explanation: degree 指學位。她去年從大學取得生物學學位，故選 degree。

sentence: His strong _____ to become a doctor pushed him to study very hard.
explanation: desire 指渴望。想成為醫生的強烈渴望驅使他努力讀書，故選 desire。

sentence: The _____ between the two cities is about two hundred kilometers.
explanation: distance 指距離。兩城市間的距離約兩百公里，故選 distance。

sentence: It is the manager's _____ to make sure all workers follow safety rules.
explanation: duty 指職責。確保員工遵守安全規則是經理的職責，故選 duty。

sentence: Good _____ can open many doors for young people in the future.
explanation: education 指教育。良好的教育能為年輕人開啟未來許多機會，故選 education。

sentence: Winning the championship took years of hard _____ from the whole team.
explanation: effort 指努力。奪冠是全隊多年努力的成果，故選 effort。

sentence: Trust is an important _____ of any good friendship.
explanation: element 指要素。信任是任何良好友誼的重要要素，故選 element。

sentence: It is normal to show strong _____ such as joy or sadness at a wedding.
explanation: emotion 指情緒。婚禮上展現喜悅或悲傷等強烈情緒是正常的，故選 emotion。

sentence: There was a small _____ in the report, so we had to fix it before sending it out.
explanation: error 指錯誤。報告中有個小錯誤，寄出前必須修正，故選 error。

sentence: It wasn't your _____ that the bus was late; there was heavy traffic.
explanation: fault 指過錯。公車遲到不是你的過錯，是交通壅塞造成的，故選 fault。

sentence: The heavy rain caused a serious _____ in the low areas of the city.
explanation: flood 指洪水。豪雨在城市低窪地區造成嚴重洪水，故選 flood。

sentence: This new phone has a special _____ that can translate languages instantly.
explanation: function 指功能。這款新手機有能即時翻譯的特殊功能，故選 function。

sentence: Waving your hand is a common _____ for saying goodbye.
explanation: gesture 指手勢、姿勢。揮手是常見的道別手勢，故選 gesture。

sentence: Brushing your teeth twice a day is a healthy _____.
explanation: habit 指習慣。每天刷牙兩次是健康的習慣，故選 habit。

sentence: Honesty is one of the most important qualities in a good friend.
explanation: honesty 指誠實。誠實是好朋友最重要的特質之一，故選 Honesty。

sentence: His great sense of _____ always makes everyone in the room laugh.
explanation: humor 指幽默感。他的幽默感總能讓在場所有人發笑，故選 humor。

sentence: The teacher explained the _____ of getting enough sleep before an exam.
explanation: importance 指重要性。老師解說考前睡眠充足的重要性，故選 importance。

sentence: Since he got a new job, his monthly _____ has increased a lot.
explanation: income 指收入。換新工作後他的月收入大幅增加，故選 income。

sentence: Tourism is one of the most important parts of this country's _____.
explanation: industry 指產業。觀光業是這個國家產業中最重要的一環，故選 industry。

sentence: Parents have a great _____ on how their children think about the world.
explanation: influence 指影響力。父母對孩子看待世界的方式有很大影響力，故選 influence。

sentence: The violin is a musical _____ that is often used in classical music.
explanation: instrument 指樂器（工具）。小提琴是古典音樂常用的樂器，故選 instrument。

sentence: There were three _____ missing from my shopping list.
explanation: item 指項目、物品。購物清單中少了三項物品，故選 items。

sentence: Reading many books can give you a lot of useful _____.
explanation: knowledge 指知識。閱讀許多書能獲得許多有用的知識，故選 knowledge。

sentence: A _____ of sleep can make it hard for students to focus in class.
explanation: lack 指缺乏。睡眠不足會讓學生上課難以專心，故選 lack。

sentence: The _____ of the swimming pool is fifty meters.
explanation: length 指長度。游泳池的長度是五十公尺，故選 length。

sentence: Her English has reached an advanced _____ after years of practice.
explanation: level 指程度、級別。多年練習後她的英文已達高階程度，故選 level。

sentence: There is a speed _____ of sixty kilometers per hour on this road.
explanation: limit 指限制。這條路的速限是每小時六十公里，故選 limit。

sentence: The hotel's _____ near the beach makes it very popular with tourists.
explanation: location 指位置。飯店靠近海灘的位置使其深受遊客喜愛，故選 location。

sentence: The team's coach was very upset about their _____ in the final game.
explanation: loss 指失敗、損失。教練對決賽的失利感到難過，故選 loss；victory 勝利語意相反。

sentence: With a bit of _____, we might still catch the last bus home.
explanation: luck 指運氣。運氣好的話還可能趕上最後一班回家的公車，故選 luck。

sentence: It is bad _____ to talk loudly on the phone in a library.
explanation: manner 指禮貌、態度。在圖書館大聲講電話是不禮貌的行為，故選 manner。

sentence: Cotton is a soft, comfortable _____ often used for making shirts.
explanation: material 指材料。棉是柔軟舒適的材料，常用來製作襯衫，故選 material。

sentence: I looked up the word in the dictionary to find its exact _____.
explanation: meaning 指意思。查字典是為了找出單字的確切意思，故選 meaning。

sentence: Visiting my old elementary school brought back many happy _____.
explanation: memory 指回憶。回到小學母校勾起許多快樂的回憶，故選 memories。

sentence: The teacher introduced a new _____ for learning English vocabulary quickly.
explanation: method 指方法。老師介紹了一個能快速學習英語單字的新方法，故選 method。

sentence: Everyone makes _____ sometimes; the important thing is to learn from them.
explanation: mistake 指錯誤。人人都會犯錯，重要的是從中學習，故選 mistakes。

sentence: Please wait a _____ ; I will be right back with your order.
explanation: moment 指片刻。請稍等片刻，馬上為您送上餐點，故選 moment。

sentence: Spending time in _____ can help reduce stress and make you feel calm.
explanation: nature 指大自然。親近大自然有助於減壓並使人平靜，故選 nature。

sentence: I would like to hear your _____ before we make the final decision.
explanation: opinion 指意見。做最終決定前想聽聽你的意見，故選 opinion。

sentence: This dress has a beautiful floral _____ printed on the fabric.
explanation: pattern 指花樣、圖案。這件洋裝印有美麗的花朵圖案，故選 pattern。

sentence: The Ming Dynasty was an important _____ in Chinese history.
explanation: period 指時期。明朝是中國歷史上重要的一個時期，故選 period。

sentence: The _____ of this small town has grown quickly in the past ten years.
explanation: population 指人口。這座小鎮的人口在過去十年迅速成長，故選 population。

sentence: She was offered a manager _____ at the company after five years of hard work.
explanation: position 指職位。她努力工作五年後獲得經理職位，故選 position。

sentence: Students often feel a lot of _____ before final exams.
explanation: pressure 指壓力。學生在期末考前常感到很大壓力，故選 pressure。

sentence: He felt great _____ when his daughter graduated from college.
explanation: pride 指驕傲、自豪。女兒大學畢業讓他感到十分自豪，故選 pride。

sentence: She won the first _____ in the school painting contest.
explanation: prize 指獎項。她在校內繪畫比賽中獲得首獎，故選 prize。

sentence: The doctor said her leg was making good _____ after the surgery.
explanation: progress 指進展。醫生說她手術後腿部復原進展良好，故選 progress。

sentence: The _____ of this meeting is to discuss next month's school trip.
explanation: purpose 指目的。這場會議的目的是討論下個月的校外教學，故選 purpose。

sentence: This shop is famous for the high _____ of its handmade shoes.
explanation: quality 指品質。這間店以手工鞋的高品質聞名，故選 quality。

sentence: The farmer produces a large _____ of rice every harvest season.
explanation: quantity 指數量。這位農夫每個收成季生產大量稻米，故選 quantity。

sentence: Nobody knows the exact _____ why the flight was delayed.
explanation: reason 指原因。沒有人知道班機延誤的確切原因，故選 reason。

sentence: The two countries have kept a friendly _____ for many years.
explanation: relation 指關係。這兩國多年來一直保持友好關係，故選 relation。

sentence: The _____ of the experiment surprised even the scientists themselves.
explanation: result 指結果。實驗結果連科學家自己都感到驚訝，故選 result。

sentence: Wearing a seat belt is important for your own _____.
explanation: safety 指安全。繫安全帶對自身安全很重要，故選 safety。

sentence: Dogs have a much better _____ of smell than humans do.
explanation: sense 指感官。狗的嗅覺比人類敏銳得多，故選 sense (of smell)。

sentence: Cooking is a useful _____ that everyone should learn.
explanation: skill 指技能。烹飪是每個人都該學習的實用技能，故選 skill。

sentence: Everyone plays a part in building a better _____ for future generations.
explanation: society 指社會。每個人都在為後代打造更好的社會盡一份力，故選 society。

sentence: The driver slowed down his _____ when he saw the school zone sign.
explanation: speed 指速度。看到學校區標誌後駕駛減慢車速，故選 speed。

sentence: This restaurant keeps a very high _____ of cleanliness in its kitchen.
explanation: standard 指標準。這間餐廳的廚房清潔標準非常高，故選 standard。

sentence: Her fashion _____ is simple but always looks elegant.
explanation: style 指風格。她的穿搭風格簡單卻總是很優雅，故選 style。

sentence: A red heart is often used as a _____ of love.
explanation: symbol 指象徵。紅色的心經常被當作愛的象徵，故選 symbol。

sentence: Cleaning the whole house before the guests arrive is not an easy _____.
explanation: task 指任務。客人來之前把整間房子打掃乾淨不是容易的任務，故選 task。

sentence: The nurse checked the child's _____ because he felt very hot.
explanation: temperature 指體溫、溫度。因孩子發燙，護理師測量他的體溫，故選 temperature。

sentence: Global warming is a serious _____ that students discussed in science class.
explanation: topic 指主題。全球暖化是學生在自然課討論的嚴肅主題，故選 topic。

sentence: Eating rice dumplings during the Dragon Boat Festival is an old _____.
explanation: tradition 指傳統。端午節吃粽子是古老的傳統，故選 tradition。

sentence: This old painting has great _____ because it was made by a famous artist.
explanation: value 指價值。這幅古畫因出自名家之手而深具價值，故選 value。

sentence: The whole town celebrated the team's _____ in the championship game.
explanation: victory 指勝利。全鎮都在慶祝球隊在冠軍賽的勝利，故選 victory；loss 失敗語意相反。

sentence: The doctor asked him to check his _____ every month.
explanation: weight 指體重。醫生要他每個月量體重，故選 weight。

sentence: As a _____, she travels around the world to report important news.
explanation: journalist 指記者。身為記者，她到世界各地報導重要新聞，故選 journalist。

sentence: My grandfather is still very _____ ; he goes hiking every weekend.
explanation: active 指活躍的。祖父仍很活躍，每週末都去健行，故選 active。

sentence: The museum displays many _____ tools used thousands of years ago.
explanation: ancient 指古代的。博物館展示許多數千年前使用的古老工具，故選 ancient；modern 現代的語意相反。

sentence: Sorry, this seat is not _____ because someone has already booked it.
explanation: available 指可利用的。這個座位已被人預訂，故不可利用，選 available。

sentence: She wasn't _____ that her phone had fallen out of her bag.
explanation: aware 指知道、意識到的。她沒意識到手機從包包掉出來了，故選 aware。

sentence: It was very _____ of the boy to jump into the river to save the drowning dog.
explanation: brave 指勇敢的。男孩跳入河中救溺水的狗是很勇敢的行為，故選 brave。

sentence: The classroom felt warm and _____ because of the large windows.
explanation: bright 指明亮的。因大窗戶使教室顯得溫暖明亮，故選 bright；dark 陰暗相反。

sentence: Even during the fire drill, the teacher stayed _____ and led the students outside.
explanation: calm 指冷靜的。即使消防演習期間，老師仍保持冷靜帶學生到戶外，故選 calm。

sentence: It was _____ of him to leave the door unlocked all night.
explanation: careless 指粗心的。整晚沒鎖門是粗心的行為，故選 careless；careful 小心的語意相反。

sentence: The night market sells lots of _____ but delicious snacks.
explanation: cheap 指便宜的。夜市賣許多便宜卻美味的小吃，故選 cheap；expensive 昂貴語意相反。

sentence: The _____ fox found a way to get the grapes without climbing the tree.
explanation: clever 指聰明的。這隻聰明的狐狸不用爬樹就找到方法拿到葡萄，故選 clever。

sentence: Catching a cold is a _____ illness, especially in winter.
explanation: common 指常見的。感冒是常見疾病，冬天尤其常見，故選 common；rare 罕見語意相反。

sentence: The building project is now _____ and the new library will open next week.
explanation: complete 指完成的。工程已完成，新圖書館下週開幕，故選 complete。

sentence: Swimming alone in the deep sea can be very _____.
explanation: dangerous 指危險的。獨自在深海游泳很危險，故選 dangerous；safe 安全語意相反。

sentence: Because his grandfather is _____, he always speaks a little louder to him.
explanation: deaf 指耳聾的。因為爺爺聽力不好，他跟爺爺講話總是比較大聲，故選 deaf。

sentence: Being a _____ student, Mary always finishes her homework before playing games.
explanation: diligent 指勤奮的。身為勤奮的學生，Mary 總是先完成作業才玩遊戲，故選 diligent。

sentence: It is _____ to copy your classmate's answers during a test.
explanation: dishonest 指不誠實的。考試抄同學答案是不誠實的行為，故選 dishonest；honest 誠實的語意相反。

sentence: They could see a _____ mountain from the top of the hill.
explanation: distant 指遙遠的。從山丘頂端可看到遠方的山，故選 distant。

sentence: The classroom was completely _____ after all the students went home.
explanation: empty 指空的。學生都回家後教室完全空無一人，故選 empty；full 滿的語意相反。

sentence: Everyone should be treated in an _____ way, no matter how rich or poor they are.
explanation: equal 指平等的。不論貧富都應受到平等對待，故選 equal。

sentence: I don't know the _____ time the meeting will start, but it should be around nine.
explanation: exact 指確切的。不確定會議確切開始時間，只知道大約九點，故選 exact。

sentence: Her English teacher gave her an _____ grade for her speech.
explanation: excellent 指優秀的。英文老師給她的演講打了優秀的成績，故選 excellent。

sentence: This small town became _____ after the movie was filmed here.
explanation: famous 指有名的。這個小鎮因電影在此拍攝而變得有名，故選 famous。

sentence: We had a _____ time at the beach; it was the best trip of the summer.
explanation: fantastic 指極好的。在海邊玩得非常開心，是夏天最棒的旅行，故選 fantastic。

sentence: It was _____ of him to walk home alone in the storm without an umbrella.
explanation: foolish 指愚蠢的。暴風雨中沒帶傘獨自走路回家是愚蠢的行為，故選 foolish。

sentence: You should wear _____ clothes to the job interview tomorrow.
explanation: formal 指正式的。明天面試應穿正式服裝，故選 formal。

sentence: The vegetables at this market are always _____, straight from the farm.
explanation: fresh 指新鮮的。這市場的蔬菜直送農場，總是新鮮，故選 fresh。

sentence: Our new neighbor is very _____ ; she always says hello and smiles at us.
explanation: friendly 指友善的。新鄰居總是打招呼微笑，非常友善，故選 friendly。

sentence: The nurse spoke in a _____ voice to calm the crying baby.
explanation: gentle 指溫柔的。護理師用溫柔的聲音安撫哭泣的嬰兒，故選 gentle。

sentence: The sun set over the sea, painting the sky a beautiful _____ color.
explanation: golden 指金黃色的。夕陽將天空染成美麗的金黃色，故選 golden。

sentence: Eating vegetables and exercising regularly can keep you _____.
explanation: healthy 指健康的。吃蔬菜並規律運動能保持健康，故選 healthy。

sentence: The librarian was very _____ and helped me find the book I needed.
explanation: helpful 指樂於助人的。圖書館員很樂於助人，幫我找到需要的書，故選 helpful。

sentence: You should always be _____ with your parents, even when you make a mistake.
explanation: honest 指誠實的。即使犯錯也應對父母保持誠實，故選 honest。

sentence: The smell coming from the trash can was absolutely _____.
explanation: horrible 指可怕的、糟糕的。垃圾桶傳來的味道非常糟糕，故選 horrible。

sentence: A _____ wave hit the boat and almost knocked the fisherman into the sea.
explanation: huge 指巨大的。一個巨浪打上船，幾乎把漁夫打入海中，故選 huge。

sentence: Even after winning the award, the singer remained _____ and thanked her whole team.
explanation: humble 指謙虛的。得獎後歌手仍謙虛地感謝整個團隊，故選 humble。

sentence: Summer in Taiwan is often hot and _____, which makes people feel uncomfortable.
explanation: humid 指潮濕悶熱的。台灣夏天常又熱又潮濕，令人不適，故選 humid；dry 乾燥語意相反。

sentence: Talking with your mouth full is considered _____ at the dinner table.
explanation: impolite 指沒禮貌的。用餐時滿嘴食物說話被視為沒禮貌，故選 impolite。

sentence: After moving out of her parents' house, she became more _____.
explanation: independent 指獨立的。搬出父母家後她變得更獨立，故選 independent。

sentence: Dolphins are known to be one of the most _____ animals in the ocean.
explanation: intelligent 指聰明的。海豚以是海中最聰明的動物之一聞名，故選 intelligent。

sentence: Living far away from his family, he sometimes feels _____ on holidays.
explanation: lonely 指孤單的。遠離家人生活，假日時有時會感到孤單，故選 lonely。

sentence: He was so tired that he could _____ keep his eyes open during the movie.
explanation: hardly 指幾乎不。他累到幾乎無法睜開眼睛看電影，故選 hardly。

sentence: It is _____ midnight, so we should go to bed soon.
explanation: nearly 指幾乎、將近。時間將近午夜了，該去睡覺了，故選 nearly。

sentence: It looks cloudy outside, so it will _____ rain this afternoon.
explanation: probably 指可能。外面烏雲密布，下午很可能會下雨，故選 probably。

sentence: She finished her breakfast _____ so she wouldn't miss the school bus.
explanation: quickly 指快速地。她快速吃完早餐以免錯過校車，故選 quickly。

sentence: The instructions were written so _____ that even a young child could follow them.
explanation: simply 指簡單地。說明寫得如此簡單，連小孩都能照著做，故選 simply。

sentence: The lights _____ went out during the storm, and the whole room turned dark.
explanation: suddenly 指突然地。暴風雨中燈突然熄滅，整個房間變暗，故選 suddenly。
